purpose: Create one fail-closed exact-SHA production release authority for the REG.RU Docker Compose contour: publish immutable API, web and migration images; apply a forward-only migration through the protected one-shot service; recreate only API and web; verify the live organization-intake path; and preserve immutable image rollback.
forbiddenCapabilities: using latest mutable tags or local builds on the production VPS
running migration from the API process or application runtime credentials
database down-migration or destructive schema rollback
changing Caddy protected environment volumes networks PostgreSQL Redis MinIO or non-target service configuration
printing SSH keys passwords database URLs protected paths or resolved Compose secrets
bypassing host fingerprint verification or using an untrusted proxy-derived SSH host
declaring deployment success without exact API and web OCI revisions and live intake evidence
changing application product code packages or lockfiles
acceptance: migration image is published from the same exact source SHA as API and web
workflow requires an exact full SHA reachable from current main and verifies all OCI revision labels
SSH and host identity fail closed before server mutation
protected Compose authority and one unambiguous migration service are discovered without printing paths or secrets
migration runs once with successful exit before API or web recreation
only API and web container identities may change and all other production containers remain invariant
API readiness and web health pass before live acceptance
live RU EN ZH routes and server-issued organization request plus exact replay pass
API and web images roll back automatically after post-deploy failure while the forward-compatible schema remains
evidence is checksummed and written to issue 3072
